commands.repair_reason: A narrow PR-branch repair is clear: move one limiter reset, add one regression for shared-auth pairing rejection, and update the changelog credit.; Needs attention: The patch reduces the pre-auth DoS surface but still clears the device-signature limiter before final device admission.; Review finding: [P2] Defer signature-bucket reset until connect admission — src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts:885 -... commands.review_summary:
Adds Gateway device-handshake field bounds, device key/signature shape pre-checks, a per-IP device-signature rate-limit scope, a PoC script, regression tests, browser/control-ui test expectation updates, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows device-id derivation and v3/v2 signature verification before auth/pairing admission, and the PR includes a concrete PoC plus targeted regression tests; I did not live-run them in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: A narrow PR-branch repair is clear: move one limiter reset, add one regression for shared-auth pairing rejection, and update the changelog credit.
